patch.value: Fix: --path/PM_PATH did not discover .agents/pm under a project root (never-block dead-end)

resolvePmRoot returned an explicit --path/PM_PATH verbatim with no discovery, so passing the project root where pm init created .agents/pm hard-failed 'tracker not initialized', while cwd-mode walks up to find it. Now redirects an explicit project-root path into its initialized .agents/pm while keeping pm init --path <dir> and existing tracker roots verbatim.

Shipped: resolvePmRoot redirects explicit project-root --path/PM_PATH into .agents/pm (verified the previously-failing case now works). Back-compat preserved for pm init --path and direct tracker roots.
